name: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc. Preferred Series B
summary: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc. Preferred Series B are preferred shares issued by AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. These shares have a fixed dividend rate and rank senior to common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution. AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a portfolio of residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), other mortgage-related assets and commercial real estate.
